name: hoc/pricing-table
description: A marketing-oriented pricing-table HOC that renders multiple tier cards side-by-side with feature lists, pricing highlights, and call-to-action buttons. Provides PricingTable, PricingTier, PricingTierHeader, PricingTierFeatures, and PricingTierAction primitives with responsive grid layouts, popular-tier badges, and theme-aware checkmark icons. Ideal for SaaS landing pages and plan-selection flows.
useCases: SaaS marketing landing pages comparing Free, Pro, and Enterprise tier capabilities
In-app upgrade prompts showing current vs premium feature differences with upgrade CTAs
Subscription-management pages where users switch between monthly and annual billing plans
E-commerce bundle pages displaying package tiers with included services and add-on options
usage: import { PricingTable, PricingTier, PricingTierHeader, PricingTierFeatures, PricingTierAction } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/pricing-table"
